name: ss13buildflags
description: Plugin to select build/debug flags for your SS13 Repo.

ss13BuildFlags.configPath.description: Workspace-relative path to build_flags.json (the flag/preset source of truth).

ss13BuildFlags.baseTask.markdownDescription: Name of an existing task (from `tasks.json`) to run with the selected flags injected. When set, F5 will run that task with flags injected instead of the config's original `preLaunchTask`.

markdownEnumDescriptions: Clones `ss13BuildFlags.baseTask` with `-D${define}` appended to its command/args (DreamMaker-style CLI defines).
Writes the selected `#define`s into `ss13BuildFlags.localDefinesPath`, then runs `ss13BuildFlags.baseTask` unmodified. Use this when the build system has no CLI define flag.
ss13BuildFlags.injectionMode.markdownDescription: How selected flags get injected into the build. See the enum descriptions for each mode.

ss13BuildFlags.localDefinesPath.markdownDescription: Workspace-relative path to a file the selected `#define`s are written into before the build task runs. Only used when `ss13BuildFlags.injectionMode` is `write-file`. Only the extension's own marked block within this file is touched — any other hand-written content is preserved.

ss13BuildFlags.definesDocPath.markdownDescription: Workspace-relative path to a single DM file scanned for `///` doc comments above `#define`s, used to auto-fill a flag's description when `build_flags.json` leaves it blank. Leave empty to disable auto-descriptions.
